CHI.headline: Bulls end 7-game skid in first game since front-office shake-up, pounding NBA-worst Wizards 129-98
CHI.description: — Rob Dillingham scored a career-high 26 points and the Chicago Bulls ended a seven-game skid, pounding the NBA-worst Washington Wizards 129-98 on Tuesday night in the opener of a two-game set.
